_comment: Per-agent model overrides. Copy to ~/.glados/model-overrides.json (outside the repo, gitignored). Maps an agent id to a model ref. These WIN over the registry/agent.json defaults, are applied verbatim (not subject to the ollama-disabled swap), and survive `git pull` + `glados update`. The dashboard model picker writes here automatically. Run `glados update` (or scripts/update.sh) to apply changes to the running config. Remove the _comment and _examples keys in your real file (unknown keys are ignored, but keep it clean).
